overview: يتعايش أربعة أشقّاء مشاكسين مع مفاجآت كثيرة تحملها إليهم الحياة ويواسون بعضهم في مواجهتها ومنها ظهور ممثّل ذات يوم ليزعم أنّه من صلب أبيهم
name: أبي الغريب
title: أبي الغريب
overview_en: Mi Yeong Hye Yeong Ra Yeong and Joon Yeong are the kids of Yeong Sil and Han Soo They seem like the average Seoul family with the typical Seoul problems but that all changes when Jung Hui an actor and former K Pop idol ends up in their doorstep claiming that Han Soo is his biological father The family goes through thick and thin one marriage after the other trying to figure out why their father happens to be strange

overview: يسعى ثلاثة أشقاء أرهقتهم رتابة حياة البالغين اليومية إلى تحقيق معنًى لوجودهم والتحرّر من حيواتهم المألوفة التي يعيشونها
name: مفكّرة الحرية
title: مفكّرة الحرية
overview_en: Three siblings exhausted by the monotony of day to day adulthood seek to find fulfillment and freedom from their unremarkable lives

name: 천추태후
title: 천추태후
overview_en: Empress Cheonchu is a 2009 South Korean period television series based on the titular character an actual historical figure and her lifelong struggle to protect the country her ancestors built The granddaughter of Goryeo Dynasty founder Taejo Wanggeon the empress ruled as the regent for her son Mokjong the dynasty s seventh ruler Determined to realize her ambitious goals for the kingdom of Goryeo she dons armor battles against foreign invaders and tramples her lover her son and brother in her rise to power

name: 청춘기록
title: 청춘기록
overview_en: In a cutthroat world where the life you re born into decides your success three aspiring youths are determined to change that perception as they fight for their dreams

name: 해피투게더
title: 해피투게더
overview_en: Happy Together is a Korean entertainment talk show

overview: بجرأة بالغة يستكشف شين دونغ يوب و سونغ سي كيونغ الثقافة الجنسية في هولندا وألمانيا عبر توليفة من التجارب العملية والمقابلات الكاشفة
name: للبالغين فقط: هولندا وألمانيا
title: للبالغين فقط هولندا وألمانيا
title_en: Risqué Business The Netherlands and Germany
overview_en: Shin Dong youp and Sung Si kyung boldly explore the sex cultures of the Netherlands and Germany mixing hands on experiences with revealing interviews

name: 구해줘
title: 구해줘
overview_en: Four young men come to the rescue of a former classmate whose family has been sucked into the clutches of a religious cult and its charismatic leader

name: 달콤한 원수
title: 달콤한 원수
overview_en: Oh Dal Nim is falsely accused of murder She decides to take revenge on those responsible for her misery

name: 야화첩
title: 야화첩
overview_en: A young artist who creates homoerotic scenes finds himself entangled in a complicated relationship with a nobleman who has an obsessive interest in both his artwork and himself

overview: تتكشف معركة قانونية عالية المخاطر حيث يتعين على المحامي إنقاذ قاتل متسلسل عبقري لحماية ابنته بينما يكافح المدعي العام من أجل الحكم عليه بالإعدام
name: الزهرة الدامية
title: الزهرة الدامية
overview_en: A former medical school dropout claiming to be able to cure terminal illnesses is sentenced to death for the murder of 17 people Is he a monstrous killer or a savior holding the cure for humanity

name: 첫 번째 남자
title: 첫 번째 남자
overview_en: A drama depicting a life threatening confrontation between a woman who takes another person s life for revenge and a woman who takes another person s life for her own desires

name: Bread Barbershop
title: Bread Barbershop
overview_en: Meet Bread He s a brilliant cake decorator who gives amazing makeovers to customers in a town inhabited by quirky little food characters

overview: بارك تاي يانج لاعبة كرة ريشة واعدة تضطر للاعتزال بسبب حادث ولكن بعد مرور 3 سنوات تقرر الانضمام لفريق يونايس وتصبح حياتها تدور حول كرة الريشة مرة أخرى فتلتقي هناك بـ بارك تاي جون الذي يعتبر الرياضة مجرد عمل
name: سرعة ذهابي اليك 493 كيلو متر
title: سرعة ذهابي اليك 493 كيلو متر
overview_en: The hottest sports romance between Park Tae yang a passionate professional badminton player and Park Tae joon who treats playing badminton as a job

name: 비디오스타
title: 비디오스타
overview_en: Four female hosts blend quick quips and laughter with candor as they invite celebrity guests to open up about their lives

overview: تصبح إن ها و ها ميونغ مراسلين صحفيين لسببين مختلفين إذ تطمح هي لاتباع خطى والدتها فيما يسعى هو لتحرّي الصدق في نقل الأخبار
name: بينوكيو
title: بينوكيو
overview_en: In ha and Ha myeong become reporters for different reasons one aspires to follow in her mother s footsteps and the other seeks to do honest news

overview: تتحدث دراما عن وحدة احتياطية من القوات الخاصة اجتمعت ليس من أجل حماية الوطن أو تحقيق السلام العالمي بل لحماية عائلاتهم وحيّهم
name: الأبطال بجوارنا
title: الأبطال بجوارنا
overview_en: It tells the thrilling and humorous story of a reserve special forces unit that comes together not to protect the country or promote world peace but to safeguard their families and neighborhood

name: 어느 날 형이 생겼다
title: 어느 날 형이 생겼다
overview_en: Abandoned by his family aspiring idol Jin experiences love for the first time with police officer Han gyeol However the forbidden relationship between step siblings begins to stand in their way

name: 부잣집 아들
title: 부잣집 아들
overview_en: Lee Gwang Jae is the son of a rich family who is reckless and immature His father dies and leaves behind large debts Gwang Jae promises to pay off his debt for his father s honor but it s not as easy as he thinks Kim Young Ha supports Gwang Jae with her positive personality and love giving encouragement to him whenever he needs it

name: Long Time No Sex
title: Long Time No Sex
overview_en: Woo Jin and Samuel a sexless married couple are utterly fed up with their lives To improve their circumstances they choose to earn money by blackmailing unfaithful couples As they track down these couples they find financial stability and rediscover their own connection They start working on their own issues but the more they delve into it the hidden truth resurfaces complicating their journey What is the truth that they have been avoiding

overview: هيون جون ليم الممثل المهمل لفترة طويلة ينهض كالعنقاء نحو النجومية يحلم بأن يصير ممثل ميلودراما شهيرًا لكن يجد نفسه عالقًا في أدوار المحققين وهنا تظهر جونغ سين وي الصحافية السياسية المجبرة على العمل في الترفيه يحدث بينهما صدام من لحظة لقائهما الأولى لكنها تُعجب به بعد مشاهدتها لـ المحقق المثالي بيل غو كانغ ومن هنا تنطلق كوميديا رومانسية بين خصمين غير متوقعين
name: يسعدني عدم مقابلتك
title: يسعدني عدم مقابلتك
overview_en: A hateful romance between a professional detective actor who wants to become a melodrama master and a female reporter who was demoted from a political reporter who won the Reporter of the Year award to the entertainment department

overview: تتمتع بان جي أوم بالقدرة على التجسد باستمرار ولكن حين تنتهي حياتها الثامنة عشرة سريعًا تكرّس عمرها التالي في العثور على حب الطفولة الذي بلغ سن الرشد حاليًّا
name: أراك في حياتي التاسعة عشرة
title: أراك في حياتي التاسعة عشرة
overview_en: Ban Ji eum can endlessly reincarnate But when her 18th life gets cut short she dedicates the next one to finding her now grown up childhood love

name: 최애의 사원
title: 최애의 사원
overview_en: A devoted fan unexpectedly joins the startup of her former idol crush and finds herself falling into a sweet awkward romance with the company s cool headed CEO

name: 신입사관 구해령
title: 신입사관 구해령
overview_en: The story takes place at the beginning of the 19th century Goo Hae Ryung is a historian who tries to fight gender stereotypes as her work is often looked down on She meets Prince Yi Rim

overview: حين تندلع ثورة الفلاحين المنادية بالمساواة في جوسون خلال القرن التاسع عشر يناضل أخوان غير شقيقين على طرفي نقيض من الصراع لأجل معتقداتهما
name: زهرة نوكدو
title: زهرة نوكدو
overview_en: Set during the period of the 1894 Donghak Peasant Revolution against the Japanese the drama tells the story of two half brothers one illegitimate and low born and one part of the pro Japanese ruling elite who find themselves on opposite sides of the conflict

name: 버디보이
title: 버디보이
overview_en: Yu ho who comes from the city feels an inexplicable and intense attraction to Jin gu whom he meets in the countryside And in the midst of excitement and confusion their relationship dangerously intertwines

overview: يفوز طالب جديد وسيم بقلب كل فتاة على بعد عشرة أمتار منه باستثناء قلبها ولكن حين يسرق قبلة سرية يبدأ عزمها وإصرارها في التلاشي
name: منبه الحب
title: منبه الحب
overview_en: Love Alarm is an app that tells you if someone within a 10 meter radius has a crush on you It quickly becomes a social phenomenon While everyone talks about it and uses it to test their love and popularity Jojo is one of the few people who have yet to download the app However she soon faces a love triangle situation between Sun oh whom she starts to have feelings for and Hye young who has had a huge crush on her

overview: يَعزف أحد المساهمين الكبار لدى شركة مالية عن التواصل مع البشر لكنّ حياته المنعزلة تختلّ على يدّ آليّة رائدة أعمال متخفّية
name: لست آليّة
title: لست آليّة
overview_en: Kim Min Gyu has wealth and success but lives an isolated life due to his allergy of people He then meets and falls in love with a girl who is pretending to be a robot for her ex boyfriend a genius robots professor

name: 청룡시리즈어워즈
title: 청룡시리즈어워즈
overview_en: The Blue Dragon Series Awards BSA is a new annual awards ceremony for original streaming content in South Korea

name: 하트시그널
title: 하트시그널
overview_en: A cohabitation of young men and women begin at Signal House where filled with rosy expectation of love and romance blooms The Predictors with vast experiences in dating and love will detect potential lovers in the Signal House The most exhilarating love game begins now

overview: يخوض طالب جامعي غمار الحياة والدراسة بينما يحاول التأقلم مع ورطة فريدة من نوعها فهو يعيش مع شابّة جميلة كانت نجمة لامعة في عالم موسيقى البوب الكورية
name: ‫دونا!
title: ‫دونا
overview_en: A college student navigates life and school while dealing with a unique predicament he s living with a beautiful former K pop sensation

name: 판타G스팟
title: 판타G스팟
overview_en: A warm friendly considerate person Hee Jae is surrounded by people who claim to know and love her The problem for Hee Jae is that she isn t really sure if she really understands herself On the other hand Mi Na is Hee Jae s confident and energetic best friend and colleague at Play Books a supplier of books and related products centered around sex and romance While an expert in how to achieve physical pleasure her understanding falls short on romantic relationships When they find themselves told to take over hosting a sex and romance advice podcast the two feel more than a little lost

overview: ينضم محامٍ شاب ومبتدئ يحمل على عاتقه مسؤولية العدالة إلى شركة قانونية رائدة حيث يفهم طبيعة عالم القانون المعقدة تحت إشراف موجّه قاسٍ وصارم
name: محامون تحت التدريب
title: محامون تحت التدريب
overview_en: A young rookie lawyer with a strong sense of justice joins a top law firm navigating the complex legal world under a cold demanding mentor

name: 투유 프로젝트 – 슈가맨
title: 투유 프로젝트 슈가맨
overview_en: Two teams battle while attempting to revamp an old song by a one hit wonder who has since disappeared from the public eye

name: 대탈출
title: 대탈출
overview_en: The variety show is a large scale game show where the members will try and escape a secret room

name: 김과장
title: 김과장
overview_en: An accountant who s deft at embezzling funds becomes an unintentional hero to his colleagues when he gets a new corporate job

name: 신서유기
title: 신서유기
overview_en: Each member takes one of the characters from the classic Chinese novel Journey to the West as they go to different destination every season

overview: في العشرينيات من عمرهما ينفصل كيونغ دو لي و وو سيو جي بعد علاقتين عاطفيتين بعد عقد من الزمن يلتقيان مجدداً كمراسل يغطي فضيحة خيانة زوجية وزوجة الرجل الذي كان محور تلك الفضيحة يلتقيان مجدداً في أواخر الثلاثينيات وقد مضى شبابهما لكن حبهما لا يزال نابضاً بالحياة يسعى كيونغ دو الآن جاهداً ليثبت لها ولنفسه أنه لا يزال يحبها
name: بالتأكيد غداً
title: بالتأكيد غداً
overview_en: In their twenties Lee Kyeong do and Seo Ji woo part ways after two passionate relationships A decade later they meet again as a reporter who covers an adultery scandal and the wife of the man at the center of that scandal Reuniting in their late thirties their youth has passed but their love remains vivid Kyeong do now strives to prove to her and to himself that he still loves her

overview: تكتشف امرأة شابة تتمتع بالقدرة على رؤية الصلات الحمراء الغامضة بين العشاق أن موهبتها السرية لم تعد فريدة من نوعها عندما تظهر نظارات خاصة تمنح قدرات مماثلة في السوق السوداء
name: الخط إس
title: الخط إس
overview_en: A young woman with the ability to see mysterious red connections between lovers discovers her secret gift is no longer unique when special glasses granting similar powers appear on the black market

overview: دراما تاريخية خيالية رومانسية تدور حول الشامان يوري بونا وثعبان أسطوري يتخذ جسد حبها الأول جاب يون يوك سونغجاي يواجهان معًا روحًا انتقامية تستهدف العائلة المالكة
name: القصر المسكون
title: القصر المسكون
overview_en: In a world of folklore and mysticism a vengeful spirit and a devoted shaman cross paths sparking a journey of love and redemption

overview: مُحقق منبوذ ومدعية شغوفة ووسيط مشبوه ينطلقون للعثور بأي ثمن على فتاة من ملهى ليليّ اختفت في ظروف غامضة بأسرار جوهرية وعلى إثرها ينكشف الوجه الآخر والقبيح لجانجنام المُتستّر تحت الأضواء المتلألئة
name: جانغنام، الجانب الآخر
title: جانغنام الجانب الآخر
overview_en: When Jaehee a top call girl at a club in Gangnam goes missing Detective Kang Dongwoo returns to crack the case Prosecutor Min Seojin aims to rise in rank while the notorious pimp Yoon Gilho becomes a prime suspect They unravel a web of secrets and connections behind the case

name: 마인
title: 마인
overview_en: Encaged in a gold clad life of secrets and lies two women in a conglomerate family seek to topple all that stands in their way of finding true joy

name: 오자룡이 간다
title: 오자룡이 간다
overview_en: Here Comes Oh Ja Ryong follows an unemployed second son in law with a good heart as he attempts to save his in laws from the greedy first son in law

name: 히어로 인사이드
title: 히어로 인사이드
overview_en: Heroes can pop out of their comic books when summoned in this comedic action adventure

overview: تدور قصة الدراما حول دو مين اك وهو مدير لفريق الوسائط المتنقلة ذكي وجيد في وظيفته وسكرتيرته جونغ جال هي يقوم دو مين اك في كثير من الأحيان بأشياء طفولية مثل الاتصال بـ جونج جال هي باستمرار جونج جال هي تنفذ أوامر مديرها دو مين اك دون شكاوى تبدو لطيفة لكنها تخفي جانبها الصعب
name: حياة مساعدتي السرية
title: حياة مساعدتي السرية
title_en: The Secret Life of My Secretary
overview_en: When a telecom executive develops face blindness he mistakes his secretary for a wealthy heiress which she allows to get out of hand

name: 용감한 형사들
title: 용감한 형사들
overview_en: Brave Detectives is a true crime show featuring a dramatic and vivid retelling of unimaginable cases It features the shocking crimes and the detectives investigation stories with blood sweat and tears

name: 나나투어 with 세븐틴
title: 나나투어 with 세븐틴
overview_en: PD Na a 20 year veteran of travel entertainment shows got a new job as a tour guide and became Guide Na He s the tour guide for SEVENTEEN who s going on a vacation into the summer of Italy

name: 화정
title: 화정
overview_en: Fair Princess Jungmyung lives a life of the highest privilege until her half brother Prince Gwanghae executes the rightful crown prince and usurps the throne Exiled from court Jungmyung goes under disguise as a man and learns to adapt to life as a commoner never forgetting Gwanghae s wrongdoing But amidst rampant corruption throughout the kingdom can Jyungmyung exact her vengeance restore order and take back her rightful place in the palace

overview: بالنسبة للعائلات التي تعيش في سكاي كاستل المجتمع السكنيّ المميّز والذي يضمّ صفوة المجتمع في كوريا يمثّل نجاح أطفالهم كلّ شيء
name: هوانم سكاي كاسل
title: هوانم سكاي كاسل
overview_en: For the families living at Sky Castle an exclusive residential community that s home to Korea s elite their children s success means everything

name: 일당백집사
title: 일당백집사
overview_en: Baek Dong Joo a newly hired funeral director has the uncanny gift or curse to momentarily resurrect and talk to the recently deceased She has to grant their last wishes or have her days be filled with a series of bad luck and accidents And helping the little boy that first terrified her when he came to life will lead her down a path she never could have expected Kim Tae Hee works as a man for hire Employed by his uncle Vincent running the newly opened errand service company A Dime A Job he can be hired for any odd but legal task One day Kim Tae Hee encounters Baek Dong Joo when he is hired by her boyfriend to break up with her in his stead After that their paths continue to cross and by the virtue of their jobs their fates get intertwined deeper and deeper in a series of life and death situations surrounding the wishes of the people who had died and the painful past it is going to unravel for both of them

name: مقلاة الحب
title: مقلاة الحب
overview_en: Chef Seo Poong was once a star chef and worked at the best Chinese restaurant His popularity faded and he eventually wound up working at a small failing Chinese restaurant Meanwhile Doo Chil Seong is the owner of a building He is an ex gang member and he was in jail for 5 yers

name: 안나
title: 안나
overview_en: The story of a woman who ends up living a completely different life due to a petty lie

name: 제왕의 딸, 수백향
title: 제왕의 딸 수백향
title_en: Su Baek hyang the King s Daughter
overview_en: This is the story of Su Baek hyang born as the elder daughter of King Mu ryeong but unable to retain her title of princess due to her ambitious younger sister Sol hui Humble and hard working she was taught never to want or to desire beyond what she has but the fate given to her is one that will affect not only her life and her family s lives but the entire nation as she struggles to find her place in life and fight for love

overview: تلتقي امرأة ناجحة هجرها حبيبها مؤخرًا بالأخ الأصغر لأفضل صديقاتها مجددًا بعد عودته من الخارج ولكنها تلقاه هذه المرة بمشاعر مختلفة تمامًا
name: الأخت الجميلة
title: الأخت الجميلة
overview_en: Explore the relationship of two people as they go from being just acquaintances to a genuine couple Yoon Jin Ah a coffee shop supervisor in her 30s and Seo Joon Hee a designer at a video game company who has just returned from working abroad

name: 미생
title: 미생
overview_en: Since he was a child the board game baduk has been everything to Jang Geu rae But when he fails at achieving his dream of becoming a professional baduk player Geu rae must leave his isolated existence and enter the real world armed with nothing but a high school equivalency exam on his resume

name: 내 아이디는 강남미인
title: 내 아이디는 강남미인
overview_en: Bullied for her looks Mi rae gets plastic surgery hoping for a better kind of life but faces new challenges in college Based on a hit Korean webtoon

name: 인사이더
title: 인사이더
overview_en: When a judicial apprentice goes behind bars while on an undercover job he plays the hand he s dealt to survive prison and get his payback

name: 나만 믿고 따라와, 도시어부
title: 나만 믿고 따라와 도시어부
overview_en: Always in pursuit of the next epic catch two fishing enthusiasts set sail with like minded celebrity guests while trading tales tips and recipes

name: 돌박이일
title: 돌박이일
overview_en: IDOL Spin off Version of Famous Variety Show 1 Night 2 Days

overview: يتتبع رحلة النجمة اللامعة هيران والوجه الجديد جواي وهما تواجهان بشجاعة الحقائق القاتمة والقاسية التي تتوارى خلف الأضواء أثناء تصوير فيلم جريء هزّ أركان صناعة السينما الكورية في ثمانينيات القرن الماضي
name: إيما
title: إيما
overview_en: In 1980s Korea a movie star and a starlet defy male dominated industry rules and backstage corruption while filming the provocative Madame Aema

overview: تتحدث دراما الطبيب الغريب عن بارك هون طفل أختطف هو ووالده من قِبل كوريا الشمالية وهناك تدرّب بارك هون على يدي والده الطبيب ليٌصبح طبيباً وأصبح بارك هون جرّاح صدر عبقري ومن ثم هرب إلى كوريا الجنوبية وبدأ يعمل هناك كطبيب في أفضل مستشفى في كوريا الجنوبية وهو مستشفى جامعة دونغوو لكنه على الرغم من هذا يشعر كغريب بينهم يبذل قُصارى جهده لجمع
name: الطبيب الغريب
title: الطبيب الغريب
overview_en: As a child Park Hoon and his dad were kidnapped and taken to North Korea He grew up there learning to be a doctor just like his father When Park Hoon escapes back to South Korea and begins work at a prestigious hospital he makes it his goal to earn enough money to go back to North Korea to rescue his true love He ll do anything to find her but then he meets and falls for a mysterious woman who looks exactly like her

overview: تحقق آري سيو نجومية كاسحة على وسائل التواصل الاجتماعي بين ليلة وضحاها فتنال الشهرة والمال والنفوذ ولكن ثمة عواقب مميتة تنتظرها في عالم المؤثرين البرّاق والمترف هذا
name: النجمة الشهيرة
title: النجمة الشهيرة
overview_en: Fame Money Power One young woman fights to become the next hottest celebrity in the glamorous yet scandalous world of influencers in Seoul

name: 아이유의 팔레트
title: 아이유의 팔레트
overview_en: IU s Palette is a fun talk show with a friendly and relaxed atmosphere The show mixes humor with two segments of music by covering songs and singing duets with the guests Source MyDramaList

overview: حين يلتئم شمل هذين العاشقين السابقين بعد سنوات هو كممثل بارع وهي كمنتجة وثائقيّة يتّضح أنّ ذكرى انفصالهما المؤلمة لم تبرح ذهنيهما
name: عاشق بلا قيود
title: عاشق بلا قيود
overview_en: The memory of their painful breakup still fresh in their minds two former lovers reunite years later as a top actor and a documentary producer

overview: الدراما تدور أحداث الدراما حول معلم الرياضيات نو جو جين المُهدد بالقتل ومساعدته لي شين آه التي تدرك أن أيامها في الحياة معدودة
name: حب مجنون
title: حب مجنون
overview_en: No Go Jin is the most popular mathematics instructor in the private education field and the CEO of GOTOP Education Even though he has only a high school level education he has achieved all of his success due to his extreme intelligence He seems like a perfect man with a handsome appearance high IQ and wealth He is also narcissistic One day he is suddenly warned that he will be murdered Lee Shin A works as No Go Jin s secretary She is a diligent and responsible employee Due to her quiet and introverted personality she has little presence with her boss No Go Jin and her colleagues at work Her colleagues begin to recognize her because she has worked for the notorious No Go Jin for more than 1 year She then learns that she does not have much time left to live

name: 소용없어 거짓말
title: 소용없어 거짓말
overview_en: A woman who can t trust people because of her ability to hear lies and a mystic composer who hid his indescribable identity become involved in each other s lives to uncover the truth

name: 레벨업 프로젝트
title: 레벨업 프로젝트
overview_en: One of the most popular Korean girl s groups Red Velvet is filming their first travel reality show

name: 내딸 꽃님이
title: 내딸 꽃님이
overview_en: Yang Kkot Nim is a therapist at a rehabilitation hospital She is bright and brave but highly emotional inside Since her father passed away Kkot Nim gets through the world with her step mom Jang Soon Ae who has been always nice to her step daughter Kkot Nim

overview: بعد أعوام من اعتقاد القصر أنّها ميتة تعود امرأة شابّة من سلالة النبلاء بعدما أصبحت راهبة إلى البلاط الملكي لاستعادة مكانتها الشرعية كملكة
name: سيّدة البلاط
title: سيّدة البلاط
overview_en: Years after she s assumed dead by the palace a young noblewoman now trained as a shaman returns to court to reclaim her rightful position as queen

name: 한글용사 아이야
title: 한글용사 아이야
overview_en: Two children summon the brave protectors of Hangeul to find the right letters of the Korean alphabet to input into their magic vending machine

name: 비밀의 남자
title: 비밀의 남자
overview_en: A man has the intelligence of a 7 year old due to an accident Han Yoo Jung is a woman with a bright and positive personality She aspired to become an announcer but her poor family background made her give up on her dream She now works hard to support her family She also lives in atonement for her fraternal twin sister s wrongdoings

name: 블랙의신부
title: 블랙의신부
overview_en: Through an exclusive matchmaking agency women strive to marry a desirable bachelor and into the highest echelon of society

overview: عندما يتوفى زوج أو لاورا يرسل الجد رجالا لأخذ حفيده من والدته وعقب محاولات فاشلة لاسترداد ابنها تقرر أوه لاورا صنع نسخة آلية منه
name: صناعة إنسان
title: صناعة إنسان
overview_en: Nam Shin is a son from a family who runs a large company After an unexpected accident he falls into a coma His mother Oh Ro Ra is an authority on brain science and artificial intelligence She creates an android named Nam Shin III which looks like just like her son Nam Shin The android pretends to be Nam Shin and he has a bodyguard So Bong

name: 금이야 옥이야
title: 금이야 옥이야
overview_en: A work about the delightful and heartbreaking story of a family growing up while raising a child centering on a single dad Geum Kang San and adopted child Ok Mi Rae who is the apple of his eye

overview: قصة مأساوية عن أخوات صغيرات يفترقن بعد طلاق والديهن ولكن يجتمع شملهن مرة أخرى كأم وزوجة ابنهن في زوبعة القدر وينتهي بهن الأمر في كارثة بعد الرغبة والصراع
name: الأختان
title: الأختان
overview_en: A tragic story about young sisters who part ways after their parent s divorce but reunite once again as mother and daughter in law in the whirlwind of fate ending up in catastrophe after desire and conflict

name: 한문철의 블랙박스 리뷰
title: 한문철의 블랙박스 리뷰
overview_en: Lawyer Han Moon chul analyzes real dashcam and CCTV footage of traffic incidents helping the public understand fault determination legal consequences and essential road safety practices

overview: تدور احداث المسلسل حول تشا جي وون مون تشاي وون محققة متزوجة من بيك هي سونج لي جون كي ولديهما طفلة يبدو بيك هي سونج كزوج وأب ملتزم ولكنه يخفي ماضيه القاسي ويعيش تحت هوية شخص آخر ويخدع زوجته بالكامل تعلم تشا جي وون عن خداعه وتقتفي آثار ماضيه
name: زهرة الشر
title: زهرة الشر
overview_en: Hiding a twisted past a man maintains his facade as the perfect husband to his detective wife until she begins investigating a series of murders

name: 연예인 매니저로 살아남기
title: 연예인 매니저로 살아남기
overview_en: Agents at a talent management firm tackle strong personalities and office politics while keeping their celebrity clients happy and helping them shine

name: 나는 SOLO
title: 나는 SOLO
overview_en: The ups and downs of dating get all too real as single men and women embark on their search for a partner worthy of love and marriage

overview: تدور احداث المسلسل حول لي يونج كوك أرمل لم يتجاوز بعد وفاة زوجته ولديه ثلاثة أطفال ثم قرر تعيين بارك دان دان كمعلمة مقيمة بالمنزل وانجذب إليها تتمتع بارك دان بشخصية مشرقة وإيجابية على الرغم من وضعها القاسي
name: الشابة والرجل النبيل
title: الشابة والرجل النبيل
overview_en: Lee Young Kook is a widower with three children He still hasn t gotten over the death of his wife He decides to hire Park Dan Dan as a live in tutor for his kids and he becomes attracted to her Meanwhile Park Dan Dan has bright and positive personality despite her harsh situation

name: 배틀 트립
title: 배틀 트립
overview_en: New style of traveling variety program where MCs divide into teams and embark on trips Afterwards they get together in the studio to discuss their trips and determine the winner with the better traveling experience

name: 마음의 소리
title: 마음의 소리
overview_en: Comedy following Cho Seok s ridiculous but hilarious adventures with his girlfriend turned wife Ae Bong their dogs older brother Jo Joon and parents Based on the popular webtoon series of the same name
